parameters.jsonBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ type: 'tradingview_signal_received', signal: $json.signal || $('Parse Signal').item.json.signal, trade_enqueue_response: $json, timestamp: $now.toISO() }) }}

parameters.responseBody: ={{ JSON.stringify({ success: true, message: 'Signal received and enqueued', signal: $('Parse Signal').item.json.signal }) }}
